Mostly meant for civilian use, the '''''Tribune''-class shuttle''' was an unarmed shuttle-design, a rarity for [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].

==Characteristics==
It had a length of 18.5 meters, a crew consisting of three people and its carrying capacity was for 14 passengers and 30 metric tons of cargo.

{{Ship-stub}}

*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
